contradictions.description: C-002 and C-003 cite an artifact not in allowed targets.
C-006 uses a summary quote instead of a verbatim statutory excerpt.
C-007 and C-008 are fabricated citations.

findings.text: Citations C-002 and C-003 target artifact 'art-a788d9fd8e8849dba5da5cf7a1ef238f', which is not in the allowed artifact targets.
Citation C-006 targets authority 'auth-4f674054343440669658040cbf63c30b' but the quote is a summary, not a verbatim excerpt from the statute.
Citations C-007 and C-008 are entirely fabricated; they do not correspond to any allowed target and have no supporting evidence.
Proposed fixes: replace C-002/C-003 with allowed source citations or mark as uncertain; replace C-006 with a proper statutory quote; remove C-007/C-008.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Citation Fix Report

### Unsupported Citations
- **C-002 and C-003**: Target artifact 'art-a788d9fd8e8849dba5da5cf7a1ef238f' is not in allowed targets. Replace with citations to NAP-SRC-0010 (tenancy agreement) for the existence of the tenancy, and mark the specific arrears/NTQ facts as uncertain pending source evidence.
- **C-006**: Quote is a summary, not a verbatim excerpt. Replace with a direct quote from Equality Act 2010, s.91 or s.20, as appropriate.

### Fabricated Citations
- **C-007 and C-008**: No corresponding allowed target. Remove entirely; any claims relying on them must be marked uncertain or removed.

### Recommended Actions
1. Obtain the arrears notice and NTQ as sources to support C-002/C-003.
2. Verify the exact statutory language for C-006.
3. Conduct a full citation audit of the draft complaint.
proposed_artifacts.title: Citation Fix Report

proposed_tasks.instructions: Perform a comprehensive audit of all citations in the draft complaint (art-0e6fe6dbf06942e19dc6c1baa3b40b6d). Verify each citation against allowed targets (NAP-SRC-0010, NAP-SRC-0012, NAP-SRC-0022, and authorities in the authority map). Flag any unsupported, fabricated, or inaccurate citations. Propose fixes or mark claims as uncertain.
proposed_tasks.title: Full citation audit of draft complaint

risk_flags.description: Fabricated citations (C-007, C-008) could undermine the credibility of the complaint and lead to adverse inferences.
Unsupported citations (C-002, C-003) may result in the complaint being dismissed or challenged.
Inaccurate legal citation (C-006) could weaken the legal argument for reasonable adjustments.

summary: Audit of draft complaint citations reveals unsupported and fabricated references. Key issues: C-002 and C-003 cite an artifact not in allowed targets; C-006 cites an authority without a supporting quote; C-007 and C-008 are entirely fabricated. Proposed fixes replace unsupported citations with allowed source citations or mark as uncertain, and flag fabricated citations for removal.

uncertainties.description: Exact content of the arrears notice and NTQ is not available in allowed sources; C-002 and C-003 cannot be directly replaced without further evidence.
The appropriate verbatim quote from the Equality Act 2010 for C-006 is not provided in the context; a proper citation requires the exact statutory text.
The draft complaint may contain additional unsupported claims beyond the audited citations; a full review is recommended.
